nasb.text: I am the Lord your God who brought you out from the land of Egypt to be your God; I am the Lord your God.”

esv.text: I am the Lord your God, who brought you out of the land of Egypt to be your God: I am the Lord your God.”

cnv.text: 我是耶和華你們的　神，曾把你們從埃及地領出來，為要作你們的　神；我是耶和華你們的　神。”

ccb.text: 我是你们的上帝耶和华，我把你们从埃及领出来，是要做你们的上帝。我是你们的上帝耶和华。”
